heading: Penalty for false statements or representations
label: 941 Penalty for false statements or representations
text: Any person who willfully makes any false or misleading statement or representation for the purpose of obtaining any benefit or payment under this subchapter shall be guilty of a misdemeanor and on conviction thereof shall be punished by a fine of not more than $1,000, or by imprisonment for not more than one year, or both.
notes: Amendments1978— substituted provisions setting the penalty for making false or misleading statements or representations for the purpose of obtaining benefits or payments for provisions relating to the Secretary’s duty to disseminate to all persons who filed claims under this subchapter prior to , information on the review provisions under the Black Lung Benefits Act of 1972.Pub. L. 95–239May 19, 1972
Effective Date of 1978 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–239section 20(a) of Pub. L. 95–239section 901 of this titleMar. 1, 1978
